title: pkcs11: sign re-fetches CKA_KEY_TYPE from HSM even when algorithm_cache is warm
description: Trigger: every call to sign() after the first algorithm() call. sign() fetches CKA_KEY_TYPE from the HSM via get_attributes, ignoring algorithm_cache. For hardware HSMs with 10-100ms per operation this is a gratuitous round-trip on every sign. Fix: call self.algorithm() (which uses the cache) inside sign() instead of re-fetching the key type attribute.
